summary: Templates updated to the dashboard-first Factory Review layout; traceability flattened to a single collapsible block; tests updated.

requirement_checks.requirement: PASS review renders new Factory Review header without legacy clutter
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md: contains '## Factory Review' and bold 'Summary', 'Findings', 'Artifacts' lines.
CI workflow run 23618905389: unit tests passed (unit: success).

requirement_checks.requirement: REQUEST_CHANGES review shares layout and preserves detailed findings
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md: same top-block and includes '{{FULL_BLOCKING_FINDINGS_DETAILS}}' token for full details.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildReviewConversationBody renders templates for both decisions.

requirement_checks.requirement: Traceability appears as a single collapsible block in both comment and review.md
evidence: scripts/lib/review-output.mjs: renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown returns a single '<details>' element with summary '🧭 Traceability' and plain Markdown subsections inside.

requirement_checks.requirement: Review authoring guidance omits manual methodology instruction
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md: contains 'Omit a manual methodology line; the control plane adds it to the published summary automatically.'

findings.title: Duplicate traceability heading
findings.details: renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown emits a top-level '## 🧭 Traceability' heading immediately followed by a '<details>' whose summary is the same string, causing a small visual duplication in rendered comments and review.md.
findings.recommendation: Remove or consolidate the extra '## 🧭 Traceability' heading so the single '<details>' wrapper contains the traceability subsections without a duplicate heading.
